envoy.description: TouchDesigner — Embody/Envoy MCP server. 53 tools for live TD network creation, parameter control, Python execution, TDN export/import.

monolith.description: Unreal Engine 5.8 — Monolith MCP server. 28 tools for editor control, scene capture, material inspection, CSV profiling.

blender.description: Blender 5.1 MCP server. Python execution in Blender context for procedural geometry generation.
